abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

actions.name: Wyrdwood Branches
actions.effects: Move the target 3", unaffected by severe terrain, toward this model.

triggers.name: Cruelty
triggers.text: Once per turn. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Writhing Roots
triggers.text: Remove a Remains or Underbrush marker within 6". This action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Roots from Below
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This action ignores LoS.
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Models that do not have LoS to this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

triggers.name: Claim Territory
triggers.text: Choose an enemy Scheme marker within range. Make a Scheme marker into base contact with the chosen marker, then remove the chosen marker.
